title: malaxis lagotis
intro: Malaxis lagotis, also known as the Malaxis orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the orchid family and is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malaxis lagotis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
